baselines.name: Null report
baselines.description: No agentic workflow. Static narrative only.

baselines.name: Single agent
baselines.description: One general agent produces an answer without verifier mesh.

baselines.name: Fixed workflow
baselines.description: Static chain with predefined steps but no proof-selection loop.

baselines.name: Unstructured swarm
baselines.description: Multiple agents discuss without gated proof or Chronicle discipline.

baselines.name: Verifier-only workflow
baselines.description: Reviewer checks final output but no mission contract or reusable capability.

baselines.name: Proof-gated coordination
baselines.description: Mission contract, role graph, proof bundle, verifier mesh, risk ledger, Chronicle.

baselines.name: GoalOS Mission 001
baselines.description: Full reproducibility packet with Evidence Docket, replay path, baselines, and acceptance gates.
